title: Delete an application.
content: Requires elevated authentication.

title: Upload an image for an application.
Deletes an image of an application.
Return all messages from a specific application.

Authenticate via basic auth and create a session.
End the current session.
content: Clears the session cookie and deletes the associated client.

title: Handle the OIDC provider callback (browser).
content:
Exchanges the authorization code for tokens, resolves the user,
creates a gotify client, sets a session cookie, and redirects to the UI.

title: Start the OIDC flow to elevate an existing client session (browser).
content:
Redirects the user to the OIDC provider's authorization endpoint. After
successful authentication, the referenced client session is elevated for
the requested duration.

title: Initiate the OIDC authorization flow for a native app.
content:
The app generates a PKCE code_verifier and code_challenge, then calls this
endpoint. The server forwards the code_challenge to the OIDC provider and
returns the authorization URL for the app to open i

title: Exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.
content:
After the user authenticates with the OIDC provider and the app receives
the authorization code via redirect, the app calls this endpoint with the
code and PKCE code_verifier. The server exchanges the

title: Start the OIDC login flow (browser).
content:
Redirects the user to the OIDC provider's authorization endpoint.
After authentication, the provider redirects back to the callback endpoint.

title: Create a user.
content:
With enabled registration: non admin users can be created without authentication.
With disabled registrations: users can only be created by admin users.

title: Application
content: The Application holds information about an app which can send notifications.

title: ApplicationParams
content: Params allowed to create or update Applications.

title: Client
content: The Client holds information about a device which can receive notifications (and other stuff).

title: ClientParams
content: Params allowed to create or update Clients.

title: CreateUserExternal
content: Used for user creation.

title: CurrentUser
content: CurrentUserExternal Model

title: Error
content: The Error contains error relevant information.

title: GotifyInfo
content: GotifyInfo Model

title: Health
content: Health represents how healthy the application is.

title: Message
content: The MessageExternal holds information about a message which was sent by an Application.

title: OIDCExternalAuthorizeRequest
content: Used to initiate the OIDC authorization flow for an external client.

title: OIDCExternalAuthorizeResponse
content: Returned after initiating the OIDC authorization flow.

title: OIDCExternalTokenRequest
content: Used to exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.

title: OIDCExternalTokenResponse
content: Returned after a successful token exchange.

title: PagedMessages
content: Wrapper for the paging and the messages.

title: Paging
content: The Paging holds information about the limit and making requests to the next page.

title: PluginConf
content: Holds information about a plugin instance for one user.

title: UpdateUserExternal
content: Used for updating a user.

title: User
content: The User holds information about permission and other stuff.

title: UserPass
content: The Password for updating the user.

title: VersionInfo
content: VersionInfo Model
